zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, , England: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Calveley於大約1220年出生在英國爾卡爾維勒時，他的父親Richard de Calveley32歲，母親Leuca Barnard6歲。他和Alicia Calveley至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1314年在他的家鄉享年95歲。

nameMeanings.name: Calveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Calveley was born about 1220, in Calveley, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Calveley, was 32 and his mother, Leuca Barnard, was 6. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Alicia Calveley. He died in 1314, in his hometown, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Calveley est né environ 1220, à Calveley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Calveley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Leuca Barnard, avait 6 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Alicia Calveley. Il est décédé en 1314, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Calveley um 1220 in Calveley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Calveley 32 und seine Mutter Leuca Barnard 6. Er hatte mit Alicia Calveley mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1314 im Alter von 95 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Calveley è nato il circa 1220 nel Calveley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Calveley, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Leuca Barnard, aveva 6 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Alicia Calveley. Morì nel 1314, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Calveleyが約1220年にイギリスチェシュアイアカルベリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Calveleyは32歳，母Leuca Barnardは6歳であった。彼はAlicia Calveleyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1314年に故郷で95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Calveley(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 체실르 캘벨리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Calveley(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Leuca Barnard(은)는 6세였다. 그는 Alicia Calveley(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 그의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Calveley nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Calveley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Calveley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Leuca Barnard, tinha 6 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Alicia Calveley. Ele faleceu em 1314, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Calveley родился около 1220 г. в местности калвели, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Calveley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Leuca Barnard, 6. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Alicia Calveley. Он умер в 1314 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Calveley nació aproximadamente 1220, en Calveley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Calveley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Leuca Barnard, tenía 6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Alicia Calveley. Murió en 1314, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años.
